validation_queries.description: Verify GPU perf counter info entries exist for GPU agents
validation_queries.error_message: No GPU perf counter info entries found in rocpd_info_pmc
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE target_arch = 'GPU'

validation_queries.description: Verify SQ_WAVES counter info entries exist (multi-dimensional)
validation_queries.error_message: No SQ_WAVES counter info entries found in rocpd_info_pmc
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name LIKE 'SQ_WAVES%'

validation_queries.description: Verify GPU perf counter sample events were recorded
validation_queries.error_message: Fewer than expected GPU perf counter sample events in rocpd_pmc_event

validation_queries.description: Verify SQ_WAVES PMC events have been recorded with non-zero values
validation_queries.error_message: No SQ_WAVES PMC events found with non-zero values
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'SQ_WAVES%' AND event.value > 0
